checklist.text: Specification DOCX assembled in USPTO section order for review.
checklist.evidence: docs/legal/SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx and patent-workbench/assembled/SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_DRAFT_v1.docx. 399 paragraphs, ~67 KB, 25 claims, 9 figures per local manifest.

checklist.text: Spec section order verified against USPTO 8-section order.
checklist.evidence: Audited assembled MD 2026-05-28: line 1 Title, line 3 Cross-Reference (63/961,403 cited), line 7 Background, line 41 Summary, line 51 Brief Description of Drawings, line 71 Detailed Description, line 1126 Claims, line 1338 Abstract. All 8 required sections present in correct order.

checklist.text: Priority claim to provisional 63/961,403 present in spec and ADS draft.
checklist.evidence: Cross-Reference section in assembled spec (line 3) cites 63/961,403, filed 2026-01-15. ADS draft at patent-workbench/ADS_PTO_AIA_14_DRAFT.md Section 4 contains domestic benefit claim under 35 U.S.C. 119(e). Must be entered in Patent Center ADS fields at filing.

checklist.text: Independent and total claim counts checked for fee impact.
checklist.evidence: 25 total claims, 3 independent (claims 1, 9, 15), 22 dependent, 0 multiple-dependent. Micro-entity fees: $70 filing + $154 search + $176 exam = $400 base; 5 extra claims (21-25) × $40 = $200; total $600. No paper surcharge, no non-DOCX surcharge, no multiple-dependent surcharge.

checklist.text: Application Data Sheet (PTO/AIA/14) draft prepared with inventor, title, priority, and entity status.
checklist.evidence: Draft at patent-workbench/ADS_PTO_AIA_14_DRAFT.md. Inventor: Issac Daniel Davis, Port Angeles, WA, US. Title matches spec. Priority: 63/961,403, 2026-01-15. Entity: Micro Entity. FILL IN required: mailing address, zip, phone. Must be entered in Patent Center — not uploaded as attachment.

checklist.text: Mailing address and phone filled into ADS draft before filing.
checklist.evidence: ADS_PTO_AIA_14_DRAFT.md has [FILL IN] markers for street address, zip code, and phone. Complete these before entering ADS data in Patent Center.

checklist.text: Inventor oath/declaration (PTO/AIA/01) draft prepared and ready to sign.
checklist.evidence: Draft at patent-workbench/DECLARATION_PTO_AIA_01_DRAFT.md. Inventor: Issac Daniel Davis. S-signature: /Issac Daniel Davis/. Must be signed in Patent Center at filing (electronically or by PDF upload). Micro Entity Certification (PTO/SB/15A) filed ~2026-03-02; re-verify eligibility on filing day.

checklist.text: Micro entity eligibility re-verified at filing; PTO/SB/15A current.
checklist.evidence: PTO/SB/15A signed ~2026-03-02 per prior email record (Gmail msg 19cb262145405494). Must re-verify on filing day: ≤4 prior U.S. utility/design/plant apps as inventor, gross income below USPTO threshold (~$258K FY2026), no large-entity assignment obligation. Provisional filings do not count toward the 4-application limit.

checklist.text: Claim 1 'superexponentially' verified against actual _harmonic_cost implementation.
checklist.evidence: PATENT_CLAIMS_EXPANDED_v2.md §7 risk note B flags: claim 1 says 'increases superexponentially' but _harmonic_cost in runtime_gate.py may be a clamped exponential, not superexponential. If the actual formula is H(d) = R^(d^2) or similar, 'superexponentially' may be defensible; if it is R^d (plain exponential), the word needs to be corrected to 'exponentially' or the claim narrowed to the exact formula in claim 3. Audit in progress.

checklist.text: Drawings FIG 1-9 cover each feature claimed in independent claims.
checklist.evidence: FIG_1 through FIG_9 exist as PNG + PDF. Brief Description of Drawings section present in spec. Spot-check needed: verify Poincaré embedding, session centroid, hyperbolic distance computation, four-way governance decision, fail-to-noise path, and PQC receipt are each shown in at least one figure. FIG numbers must match figure-reference text in Detailed Description.

checklist.text: Every claim element mapped to written-description support in spec.
checklist.evidence: Component→claim map in PATENT_CLAIMS_EXPANDED_v2.md §2. Claim support scan shows 120+ term hits. High-risk items per §7 of claims v2: fail-to-noise (claim 7) depends on provisional text; bijective tamper (claims 15-20) support uncertain; Sacred Eggs/Byzantine/Hopfield (claims 21-24) are CIP candidates — only get non-provisional filing date unless provisional already covers them.

checklist.text: Post-2026-01-15 improvements separated from provisional-supported material.
checklist.evidence: Claims 21-24 (Sacred Eggs, Byzantine swarm trust, Hopfield intent energy) flagged as likely CIP material in PATENT_CLAIMS_EXPANDED_v2.md §7. These may only receive the non-provisional filing date. Decision needed: include in this application (accepting later date for those claims) or file a separate CIP. Claim 25 (juggling scheduler) assessed as having strong support.

checklist.text: Prior-art search log completed and IDS decision made.
checklist.evidence: prior_art_search_log.md exists. Completeness unknown. Minimum: Google Patents search for 'hyperbolic geometry authorization', 'Poincare ball security', 'post-quantum cryptographic receipt', top-10 results logged. IDS (Information Disclosure Statement) decision required: if you found relevant art, it should be disclosed.

checklist.text: Non-publication request decision made (any foreign or PCT filing planned?).
checklist.evidence: If you file or plan to file abroad or via PCT, you cannot request non-publication. If U.S.-only, you may request non-publication at filing (check box in Patent Center). Default: applications publish ~18 months after earliest priority date (2027-07-15). Decision must be made before submitting.

checklist.text: Benchmark/test evidence packet prepared for prosecution support.
checklist.evidence: resonant_thought_lattice_benchmark.json shows baseline_mean=0.615 vs lattice_mean=0.9163, delta=0.3013, 7/8 improved. This supports utility and non-obviousness arguments. Optional: package Petri gate recall results (97.7% after KO gate) as informal evidence. Not filed with application but used during examination responses.

checklist.text: Source-code appendix/pseudocode decision made.
checklist.evidence: USPTO permits computer-readable form (CRF) appendix on CD/flash (37 CFR 1.52(e)) but it is rarely filed for software patents. More common: embed pseudocode in the specification. Verify Detailed Description includes enough pseudocode/flowchart description that claims can be fully understood without the source code. Source code itself is not required and creates prior-art publication risk.

checklist.text: Inventor/applicant ownership posture confirmed.
checklist.evidence: SAM.gov registration shows sole proprietor. No employment agreement that would require assignment. Confirm: no university, employer, or funded research contract that claims rights to this invention. If ownership is 100% inventor (Issac Daniel Davis), no assignment record is needed at filing — can record later if needed.

checklist.text: Broad claim fallbacks and continuation/CIP strategy identified.
checklist.evidence: Broad claims (1, 9, 15) identified. Dependent claims 21-24 are CIP candidates. Strategy decision: (a) file all 25 claims in this application and accept that claims 21-24 get the 2026-05-XX filing date; or (b) file claims 1-20/25 now and file a CIP within 12 months for claims 21-24. CIP must be filed before the parent issues.

checklist.text: Spec DOCX accepted by Patent Center DOCX validation tool.
checklist.evidence: Run SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx through Patent Center validator before filing. Common failures: non-Times-New-Roman font, line spacing, margins, page numbers in wrong location. Tool is at patentcenter.uspto.gov → Tools → DOCX Validator.

checklist.text: Provisional filing receipt saved to patent-workbench/uploads/.
checklist.evidence: uploads/ is empty. Export acknowledgment PDF for 63/961,403 from Patent Center and save here as evidence freeze. Not required for filing the non-provisional, but good housekeeping.

checklist.text: Materials reviewed: no credentials, private keys, private addresses, or unrelated personal records in uploads.
checklist.evidence: uploads/ is currently empty. Before placing any file in uploads/, verify it contains only patent-related material. Do not upload .env files, API keys, personal financial records, or medical records.

checklist.text: USPTO fees verified on filing day.
checklist.evidence: Estimate: $600 micro-entity (see claim_count_checked). Verify current rates at USPTO fee schedule on filing day — fees can change. Pay in Patent Center at submission.

blocking_before_submission: ads_address_filled — fill in street address, zip, phone in ADS draft
superexponential_formula_verified — fix 'superexponentially' in claim 1 if _harmonic_cost is plain exponential
docx_validated — run DOCX through Patent Center validator
non_publication_decision_checked — make the call before submitting
fees_rechecked — verify amount on filing day
important_but_not_blocking: prior_art_logged — IDS should be filed if you found relevant art
drawings_complete — spot-check FIG coverage of independent claim elements
